evidence: We have invested over $76.7 billion in research and development since our inception, yielding inventions that are essential to modern computing.
More than half of our engineers work on software.
We entered into multi-year cloud service agreements to support our research and development activities.
NVIDIA powers over 78% of the supercomputers on the global TOP500 list, including 9 of the top 10 systems on the Green500 list.
Blackwell Ultra platform...delivers a significant increase in token throughput and reduction in cost per token compared to the Hopper generation.
Rubin platform...delivering up to a 10x reduction in cost per token compared to Blackwell.
Issues relating to the responsible use of our technologies, including AI, may result in reputational or financial harm and liability.

As of the end of fiscal year 2026, we were effectively foreclosed from competing in China's data center computing/compute market, and our effective foreclosure from the China market helped our competitors build larger developer and customer ecosystems.
The availability of data centers, energy, and capital to support the buildout of NVIDIA AI infrastructure by our customers and partners is crucial, and any shortage...could impact our future revenue.

capex_mentions.quote: invested over $76.7 billion in research and development since our inception
capex_mentions.context: Cumulative R&D spend since founding, not a single-year AI capex figure; includes all R&D, not AI-specific

capex_mentions.quote: multi-year cloud service agreements to support our research and development activities
capex_mentions.context: Multi-year cloud/compute commitments for R&D; no dollar amount disclosed in excerpts

limitations: ai_investment_intensity scored 3 (not 4 or 5): the $76.7B figure is cumulative lifetime R&D across all activities, not a quantified AI-specific or forward capex commitment; no dollar amounts for AI infrastructure spend appear in the excerpts.

ai_narrative_concreteness: quantified claims (10x cost reduction, 78% TOP500 share, token throughput gains) are present but some are forward-looking product specs rather than independently verified deployed outcomes; confidence adjusted accordingly.

ai_risk_disclosure_depth: risk-section excerpts are present and contain named, company-specific risk mechanisms (China export controls, energy/data center availability, responsible AI liability) with revenue impact pathways described, supporting score 4; no quantified risk figures or named governance bodies found in excerpts to support score 5.
